effect: During round 1, the final reroll is skipped.
archetype_skew: Favors Aggro (take what you roll). Hurts Control (relies on rerolls).
Favors Control. Neutral for Economy. Hurts Aggro.

effect: From round 6 onwards, if you attacked with 4+ combat faces and all combat dice damage was blocked, deal +1 damage.
archetype_skew: Favors Aggro with focused dice. Neutral for others.

effect: Both players start with +1 HP (16 total).
archetype_skew: Favors Control and Combo (longer matches). Hurts Aggro.

effect: From round 7 onwards, both players lose 1 HP at end of each round.
archetype_skew: Favors Aggro and Combo (ticking clock). Hurts Control (turtle).

effect: From round 6 onwards, if you rolled 2 or more Gilded Hands, bank +1 extra token.
archetype_skew: Favors Economy and Combo. Hurts strategies that ignore Hand dice.

effect: God Powers cannot be activated during round 1.
archetype_skew: Favors Aggro (dice-focused). Hurts Combo (God Power dependent).

effect: During round 1, one random die per player is locked and cannot be rerolled.
archetype_skew: Favors flexible builds. Hurts Combo (rigid synergies).

effect: If your defensive dice block 6 or more attacks this round, gain 1 token.
archetype_skew: Favors Control. Neutral for Economy. Hurts pure Aggro.

effect: God Powers costing 9 or more cost 1 fewer token.
archetype_skew: Favors Combo and offensive builds. Accelerates all matches.
